user.title: Irritrol LifeDC
user.description: Select a discovered Irritrol LifeDC controller or enter its BLE MAC address manually. The controller usually appears as Life-DC-XXXXXXX. Use the entity prefix to control the generated entity IDs. Default: irritrol_lifedc.

error.address_required: BLE MAC address is required when using manual entry.

abort.already_configured: This LifeDC controller is already configured.
abort.not_supported: This Bluetooth device is not an Irritrol LifeDC controller.

init.title: Irritrol LifeDC BLE protocol settings
init.description: The default command profile is built for one tested Irritrol LifeDC 4-zone controller. If another controller or firmware uses a different profile, select Custom and adjust the command settings.

error.invalid_hex_payload: Invalid hex payload. Use byte values such as: 31 05 12 01 00 00 B4
